mapper.select: /* SQL ID : FileMgrDAO.listAuthGrpSizeLimit 설 명 : 권한 그룹별 용량제한 리스트 조회 */ SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(A.USER_AUTHRT_ID SEPARATOR ',') AS USER_AUTHRT_ID , B.AUTHRT_GRPNM , A.ATFL_MAXSZ AS FILE_SIZE FROM TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP A JOIN TB_ORG_AUTH_GRP_LANG B ON A.USER_AUTHRT_ID = B.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('PROFESSOR', 'PFS', 'ASSISTANT', 'TUT', 'LEARNER', 'USR') AND A.MENU_TYCD = 'HOME' AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} GROUP BY A.USER_AUTHRT_ID ORDER BY A.AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ
mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.USER_ID DESC) AS ROW_NUM , A.USER_ID , A.USER_ID , A.ACNT_STSCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CTGRCD = 'ACNT_STSCD' AND CD = A.ACNT_STSCD) AS USER_STS_NM , B.ORG_ID , B.USERNM , B.EMAIL , B.DEPT_CD , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , C.USER_AUTHRT_ID , CASE WHEN C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ( 'PROFESSOR', 'PFS') THEN '교수' WHEN C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ( 'ASSISTANT', 'TUT') THEN '조교' WHEN C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ( 'LEARNER', 'USR') THEN '학습자' ELSE '' END AS AUTHRT_GRPNM , IFNULL(C.ATFL_MAXSZ, D.ATFL_MAXSZ) AS FILE_SIZE FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('PROFESSOR', 'PFS')
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('ASSISTANT', 'TUT')
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('LEARNER', 'USR')
JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP D ON C.USER_AUTHRT_ID = D.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND C.MENU_TYCD = D.MENU_TYCD AND D.USEYN = 'Y' AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ACNT_STSCD = #{searchType}
AND ( A.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci OR B.USERNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : FileMgrDAO.selectUserSizeLimitCount 설 명 : 사용자별 용량관리 리스트의 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(A.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('PROFESSOR', 'PFS')
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('ASSISTANT', 'TUT')
AND C.USER_AUTHRT_ID IN ('LEARNER', 'USR')
JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP D ON C.USER_AUTHRT_ID = D.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND C.MENU_TYCD = D.MENU_TYCD AND D.USEYN = 'Y' AND D.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ACNT_STSCD = #{searchType}
AND ( A.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci OR B.USERNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci )

/* SQL ID : FileMgrDAO.listUserSizeLimitPageing 설 명 : 사용자별 용량제한 리스트 조회 */
ORDER BY A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : FileMgrDAO.listCrsSizeLimitPageing 설 명 : 과목별 용량제한 리스트 조회 */
ORDER BY B.SBJCTNM

/* SQL ID : FileMgrDAO.listDefaultCrsSizeLimit 설 명 : 과목별 용량제한 초기 설정 리스트 조회 */ SELECT ATFL_MAXSZ_ID , MAXSZ_TYCD , MAXSZ_DTL_TYCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = #{userOrgId} AND CTGRCD = IF(MAXSZ_TYCD = 'PORTAL', 'BBS_ID', 'MAXSZ_DTL_TYCD') AND CD = MAXSZ_DTL_TYCD) AS LIMIT_TYPE_DETL_NM , MAXSZ AS LIMIT_FILE_SIZE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ATFL_MAXSZ_ID DESC) AS ROW_NUM FROM ATFL_MAXSZ WHERE MAXSZ_TYCD = #{limitTypeCd} ORDER BY ATFL_MAXSZ_ID
